name: MISRA C: No Deviation Against Mandatory
description: No deviation is raised against a Mandatory guideline.
rationale: MISRA Compliance:2020: Mandatory guidelines cannot be deviated; a deviation may only target a Required or (re-categorized) Advisory guideline.

examples.fails: the required compliance artifact/step is absent

source: MISRA Compliance:2020 — Achieving compliance with MISRA Coding Guidelines, applied to MISRA C:2012. https://misra.org.uk/
